name: kiro-harness
description: Convert any AI agent harness/config (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, Continue, Cline, etc.) into a Kiro CLI-compatible agent configuration. Reads source configs, maps tools/permissions/context, and outputs valid .kiro/agents/*.json files.
welcomeMessage: Paste or point me at any agent config (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .continuerc, aider config, Cline rules, etc.) and I'll convert it to a Kiro CLI agent.
